scripts.dev: echo 'Use individual package dev commands:' && echo '  bun run dev:mini-app  - Start Zalo Mini App' && echo '  bun run dev:server    - Start backend API' && echo '  bun run dev:worker     - Start AI Worker' && echo '  bun run dev:all       - Start all services'
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "bun run dev:mini-app" "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:worker"
